subject: Zamasu — a humanoid figure with green skin, white-purple hair, and dark robes, crackling with energy
description: A humanoid figure with distinctly green skin and white or pale-violet hair is depicted in a dynamic offensive pose, energy crackling around raised hands or extended arms. The figure wears dark flowing robes over a white inner garment. The expression is aggressive or contemptuous. The background is energized with golden-yellow light bursts suggesting a power discharge. At low resolution, fine details of the face and hands are not fully resolved, but the overall composition is clear: a powerful figure unleashing energy in a combat stance.
foreground: green-skinned robed humanoid with energy crackling at the hands
emotion: contempt and aggression — combative stance, energy raised offensively
